_value.description: Unusual Options Activity identifies options contracts that are trading at a higher volume relative to the contract's open interest. Unusual Options can provide insight on what "smart money" is doing with large volume orders...

_value.title: Unusual Stock Options Activity - Barchart.com
_value.description: Most Active Options. Unusual Options Volume.The page defaults to show today's data, and the "Details" link on each line item will take you to the symbol's Unusual Options Activity page for the expiration date show, for even more in-depth analysis (Premier Members only.)

_value.title: Analyzing Unusual Options Activity
_value.description: Unusual options activity refers to an abnormal surge in the volume of options contracts traded for a specific stock, compared to its average daily options volume. When options volume spikes well beyond the norm, it can indicate heightened investor interest.

_value.title: Unusual Options Activity Explained: How to Spot Smart Money
_value.description: What is unusual options activity? Learn how traders track smart money, identify large options trades, and use this data to find setups.

_value.title: Unusual Options Activity | TrendSpider Learning Center
_value.description: Unusual options activity in this context could indicate hedging activity related to an existing stock or portfolio position. Technical analysis signals: Traders who employ technical analysis techniques may use options activity as a signal for potential price movements.

_value.title: Unusual Options Activity: Strategies and Risk Insights
_value.description: Learn what unusual options activity means, and discover best strategies for leveraging this information to enhance your trading decisions.

_value.title: What is Unusual Options Activity? - New Trader U
_value.description: Unusual options activity can provide insight on what smart money, insiders, and big traders are doing with large volume option orders.Unusual option activity doesn’t always work out as a win for the option trader and the positions can be closed out before expiration for losses or profits.
